testcase.name: test_generate_session_access_token

failure.message: TypeError: argument of type 'coroutine' is not iterable

testcase.failure:
pm_api = <pmClient.pmClient.PMClient object at 0x106804750> mocker = <pytest_mock.plugin.MockerFixture object at 0x1068074d0>
def test_generate_session_access_token(pm_api, mocker): response = { "access_token": "access_token", "public_access_token": "public_access_token", "read_access_token": "read_access_token" } mocker.patch("pmClient.apiService.ApiService.api_call_helper", return_value=response) > pm_api.generate_session("request_token")
tests/test_pmClient.py:46: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <pmClient.pmClient.PMClient object at 0x106804750> request_token = 'request_token'
def generate_session(self, request_token=None): """Generate session and get the tokens""" if request_token is not None: request_body = {'api_key': self._api_key, 'api_secret_key': self.api_secret, 'request_token': request_token} else: raise TypeError("Request Token cannot be null or empty") response = ApiService.api_call_helper(self, "access_token", Requests.POST, None, request_body) > if "access_token" in response: E TypeError: argument of type 'coroutine' is not iterable
pmClient/pmClient.py:63: TypeError

testcase.name: test_live_market_data
testcase.failure:
pm_api = <pmClient.pmClient.PMClient object at 0x106a1ab90> mocker = <pytest_mock.plugin.MockerFixture object at 0x106a1a910>
def test_live_market_data(pm_api, mocker): response = { "data": [ { "last_trade_time": 1, "last_update_time": 1 } ] } mocker.patch("pmClient.apiService.ApiService.api_call_helper", return_value=response) > pm_api.get_live_market_data( mode_type="FULL", preferences="NSE:13:INDEX" )

def get_live_market_data(self, mode_type, preferences: List[str]): """ Live Market data mode_type: mode of preference prefrences: list of pref, example format -> preferences=["exchange:scrip_id:scrip_type","exchange:scrip_id:scrip_type"] """ params = { 'mode_type': mode_type, 'preferences': ','.join(preferences) } response = ApiService.api_call_helper(self, 'live_market_data', Requests.GET, params, None)
